examples: Tables are set with white china and gold-banded silver cutlery.
Each piece of cutlery is hand crafted and has it's own character.
Though the chopstick is the quintessential cutlery choice throughout most of Asia.
The hum of improvised conversation, the rustling of newspapers turning, the clinking of cutlery.
Enter HAPILABS and the HAPIfork which brings your cutlery kicking and screaming into 2013.
